title: AISOC Farm Shared Finding
description: Mandatory 8-key envelope that every agent — and the Orchestrator's consolidated REPORT — must emit. Agents may add agent-specific keys after the shared ones; they may not omit any shared key. See skills/boot/SKILL.md Block 2 for the prose contract.

agent.description: Agent name and dispatch number, e.g. 'DNS Sentinel #3'.

evidence.description: Verbatim references to the input rows / lines / fields that support the verdict. No invented content.

attck.description: MITRE ATT&CK technique IDs actually triggered by the input. Empty array if the verdict is benign.

recommendation.description: What to do next. Active responses (block, isolate, push rule, quarantine) MUST carry 'recommendation_status: proposed' and remain HITL-gated.

rationale.description: Why this verdict, given the evidence. Must name the 2-3 strongest individual indicators.

recommendation_status.description: Optional HITL gate state. Active recommendations start at 'proposed' and only move to 'approved' after a second Plan-and-Approve cycle.
